[$$\mathrm{K}_{\mathrm{a}}$$ : dissociation constant]

[Given : $$\mathrm{R}=0.083 \mathrm{~L} \mathrm{~bar} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1} \mathrm{~K}^{-1}$$]

[$$\overline{\mathrm{c}}_{\mathrm{v}}$$ is the molar heat capacity at constant volume]

If the focal distance of the point $$(7,1)$$ on $$C$$ is $$d$$, then $$12 d$$ equals ________.

subject: Mathematics

subject: Mathematics

    D.
    Permeability of free space
    IV.
    $$\left[M^1 L^2 T^{-2}\right]$$

subject: Physics
question_text: For three vectors $$\vec{A}=(-x \hat{i}-6 \hat{j}-2 \hat{k}), \vec{B}=(-\hat{i}+4 \hat{j}+3 \hat{k})$$ and $$\vec{C}=(-8 \hat{i}-\hat{j}+3 \hat{k})$$, if $$\vec{A} \cdot(\vec{B} \times \vec{C})=0$$, then value of $$x$$ is ________.

subject: Physics
question_text: The refractive index of prism is $$\mu=\sqrt{3}$$ and the ratio of the angle of minimum deviation to the angle of prism is one. The value of angle of prism is _________$$^\circ$$.

question_text: A wire of resistance $$R$$ and radius $$r$$ is stretched till its radius became $$r / 2$$. If new resistance of the stretched wire is $$x ~R$$, then value of $$x$$ is ________.

micro_topic: Ac Circuits And Power In Ac Circuits
question_text: When a $$d c$$ voltage of $$100 \mathrm{~V}$$ is applied to an inductor, a $$d c$$ current of $$5 \mathrm{~A}$$ flows through it. When an ac voltage of $$200 \mathrm{~V}$$ peak value is connected to inductor, its inductive reactance is found to be $$20 \sqrt{3} \Omega$$. The power dissipated in the circuit is _________ W.

subject: Physics
question_text: A circular coil having 200 turns, $$2.5 \times 10^{-4} \mathrm{~m}^2$$ area and carrying $$100 \mu \mathrm{A}$$ current is placed in a uniform magnetic field of $$1 \mathrm{~T}$$. Initially the magnetic dipole moment $$(\vec{M})$$ was directed along $$\vec{B}$$. Amount of work, required to rotate the coil through $$90^{\circ}$$ from its initial orientation such that $$\vec{M}$$ becomes perpendicular to $$\vec{B}$$, is ________ $$\mu$$J.
